nasb.text: and Shelah lived four hundred and three years after he became the father of Eber, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Shelah lived after he fathered Eber 403 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 沙拉生希伯以後，又活了四百零三年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了四百零三年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 萨勒生了希伯之后，又活了四百零三年，并且生了其他的儿女。
